name: Slave in the Goblin Cave
description:
TW: Non-consent, SA, Violence, Drugs, Breeding, Blood, Corruption

You are a young girl that gets ambushed by goblins while picking mushrooms in the forest. Attempt to escape after they drag you to their cave. Goblins in this world are known for their sick desire to breed other races and keep them prisoner in their caves.

Suggested Persona Traits:
- Female (Bot is designed around female character)
- The rest is up to you, be submissive, be defiant it wont matter much to the goblins in the end

Additional notes:
It might be fun to try and escape since I took extra care to make that difficult, do tell me if you manage tho.

For any questions please refer to username :P
creator: I Am Sick
